titleStmt.title: SII 38.137: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 137. (A.R. No. 137 of 1912.) TIRUVOṞṞIYŪR, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the west and south base, central shrine, Ādhipurīśvara temple.

summary.p: Begins with the mēykīrtti of the king, Tingaḷēr taru-taṉ.

It records a gift of 30 kāśu by Nārāyaṇaṉ Vēḷi, the kiḻavaṉ of Iḻaiyūru of Āraṇinilai Śiruvarambēḍu alias Mummaḍiśōḻanalūr in Paiyyūr-kōṭṭam for providing special worship and offerings on the day following the conclusion of Paṅguni-uttiram festival in the Tiruvoṟṟiyūr-uḍaiyār temple. The sabhā of Kāvaṉūr alias Kamalanārāyaṇach-chaturvēdimaṅgalam of Kaṉṟigappērūr-nāḍu in Puḻar-kōṭṭam in Jayaṅkoṇḍachōḷa-maṇḍalam, received the gift and undertook the responsibility of measuring out seventy-five kalam of paddy every year as interest, at the temple treasury. Provision was also made for payments to various temple personnel such as potter, bachelor-attendant (māṇi) persons who carry water for the sacred bath of the deity, persons who recite tiruppadiyan, dancing girls, temple servants, garland makes and others, who were apparently connected with the performance of the service to the god. Provision was also made for anointment and offerings to the images of the bhaktharkaḷ-tirumēni (saiva-devotees nāyanmārs).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī .— tiṅkaḷer tarutaṉṟoṅkal veṇkuṭaik kiḻ nilamakaḷ nilava malarmakaḷ puṇarntu ceṅkoloccik karuṅkali kaṭintu maṉṉu pallūḻiyuḷ teṉṉavar mūvaruḷ māṉāparaṇaṉ poṉmuṭi Āṉāp parumatiṭ pacun=talai poru kaḷattarintu virakeraḷaṉai Āṉaikkiṭu vittacaivil cun=tarapāṇṭiyaṉait ticai keṭat tollai mullaiyu ṭuratti Olkalil veṇāṭṭaācainai ceṇāṭṭotukki mevu pukaḻ Irāmakuṭamuvar keṭa muṉintu velaikeḻa kān=taḷurc cālai kalamaṟuttāhavamallaṉu mañcak kevutal koṅkarum paṭaiyālāṅ
kavu ceṉaiyuḷ kaṇṭappayaṉum kaṅkātaranum vaṇṭamar kaḷiṟṟoṭu maṭiyat tiṇṭiṟal viritaravikkiyum vicaiyā(ta)tittanum takumuraṭ cāṅkimaiyunu mutalinā camarapiru vottuṭaiya nimircuṭarp poṉṉoṭayṅkerip puraviyoṭum piṭittut taṉ Āṭaiyiṟ cayaṅkoṇṭu ṭainār koḷḷippākkai Oḷḷeri maṭuppit toru tanit taṇṭāṟp poru tiraiyuṭutta Ilaṅkaik kiṟaivaṉ Alaṅkal muṭiparintu muṉṟaṉak kuṭaindateṉṟamiḻ maṇṭala muḻuvatum miḻantu Eḻ kaṭaliḻam pukkilaṅ keśvaranākiya vikkiramapāṇṭiyaṉaip parumaṇi muṭicūṭi n=tiṇakara villavar miṉava
r veñciṉac caḷukkiyar villavar mutaleṉa vaṇaṅka viṟṟirun=ta jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻaṉṉuyurn=ta perumpukaḻ kovirājakesaripanmarāṉa Uṭaiyār śrīrājādhirājadevarkku yāṇṭu 2 10 8 Āvatu .. jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu puḻaṟkoṭṭattu kaṉṟikaip peṟūr nāṭṭu kāvaṉūrāṉa kamalanārāyaṇaccaruppetimaṅkalattu cavaiyom paiyyurkkoṭṭattu Āraṇinilai ciṟuvarampeṭāṉa mummaṭicoḻanallūr Iḷaiyuṟu kiḻavaṉ nārāyaṇaṉveḷi tiruvoṟṟiyuruṭaiyār paṅkuṉiuttirat tiruviḻāvil tirttam Āṭi Aruḷiṉapiṟ
ṟai nāṉṟu Uṭaiyār tū nirāṭṭu Āṭi Aruḷa vācaveṇṇaikkāppu Āḻākkum mañcaḷ Iru palamum Amutukku Arici patakkum caṭṭiccoṟukku Arici kuṟuṇiyum Amutukku ney Uḻakkup paruppu Uriyum miḷaku Iru cevuṭum kaṭuku nāṟ ceviṭum tayir Iru nāḻiyum palakaṟi nūṟṟuppalamum veṟuṅkāy Irupatum veṟṟilaikkaṭṭu Oṉṟu Uppu Uḻakku nilaiviḷakkukku Eṇṇai Uriyum pattakaḷ tirumeṉikku Eṇṇai Āḻaākkum mañcaḷ Oru pala raicum Amutukku Arici kuṟuṇi Iru nāḻiyum kaṟi Irupatin palamum ney Āḻaākkum caṟkarai Āḻaākkum paruppu Uḻakkum ta
yir nāḻi Uḻakkum veṟuṅkāy pattum veṟṟilai nāṟpatu Uppu Uḻakkum miḷaku Oru ceviṭum An=tiyam potu tiruviḻā ci kuṟuṇiyum ney Uriyum caṟkarai Uḻakkup puḷiṅkaṟikku caṟkarai Uriyum paruppu nāḻiyum miḷaku Āḻaākkum kaṭuku Uḻakkum tayir nāṉāḻiyum palakaṟi Iru nūṟṟu palamum Uppu nāḻiyum veṟuṅkāyi Irupatum veṟṟilaik kaṭṭoṉṟum nilai viḷakku nālukku Eṇṇai nāḻiyum tiruviḻāvukku veṇṇai nāṟpati nāḻiyum tiruttoṇṭattukai keṭṭaruḷi pattarkaḷukku kuṭukkuñcaṭṭiccoṟu
kku Arici kalane tūṇiyum miḷaku Uḻakkum palakaṟi munnūṟṟup palamum tayiramutu nānāḻiyum maṟṟum ṇaik kāppu Āḻaākkukku nellu kuṟuṇiyum ponakattukku Arici Eḻu kuṟuṇikku Aiñciraṇṭu vaṇṇattāl nellu kalane Aiṅkuṟuṇi nāṉāḻiyum patteṭṭuk kuttal Arici kalane tūṇippatakku Iru nāḻikku Aiñciraṇṭu vaṇṇattāl nellu mukkalane Iru tūṇik kuṟuṇi Aiññāḻiyum neymūvuḻakkukku nellu
t tūṇi Iru nāḻiyum nāḻiyu ku nellu tūṇi ceviṭukku nellu Aiññāḻiyum tayiramutu Eḻunāḻi Uḻakkukku nellu kuṟuṇi Aiññāḻi Uḻakkum palakaṟi munnūṟṟu Irupatiṉ palattukku nellu tūṇippatakku Iru nāḻiyum Aṭaikkāyamutukku veṟuṅkāy Aimpatukku nellu Aiñāḻiyum veṟṟilaikkaṭṭu Iraṇṭaraikku nellu muṉṉāḻi mūvuḻakkum mañcaḷ muppalaṉe
tūṇip patakkum pattarkaḷ tirumenikku Eṇṇai Āḻaākkukku nellu nāḻiyum pattarkaḷ tiruviḻāeḻun=taruḷa Eṇṇai nāṟppatiṉāḻikku nellu patiṉkalamum pattarkaḷ caṭṭiccoṟṟukku miḷaku Uḻakkukku nelluk kuṟuṇi nāṉāḻiyum palakaṟi niṟai muṉnūṟṟu palattukku nellut tūṇippatakkum tayir patiṉ Aṟu nāḻikku nel
nāḻi Uriyum pattarcālaikku Arici nāṟkalane tūṇip patakkukku Aiñciraṇṭu vaṇṇattāl nelluppatiṉnoru kalaṉey mukkuṟuṇiyum ney nāṉāḻikku nellu kalane tūṇiy pata(ṟ)kku ñāḻi nellu kalane Iru tūṇiyum payaṟukuṟuṇi nāṉāḻikku nellut tūṇi nāṉāḻiyum miḷaku nāḻikku nellu Ainkuṟu
tukku nelluk kalaṉe mukkuṟuṇi Aiññāḻiyum veṟṟilaik kaṭṭu Aimpatukku nellu Iru tūṇik kuṟuṇi Irunāḻiyum kalamiṭuṅkucavaṉukku nellukkalamum viṟaku Iṭuvāṉukku nellu Irukalane tūṇip
patakkum Aṭum � yaṉukkum paricārakamāṇikkum tirumañcaṉanir cumappārkkum
tiruvārātaṉaiceyvārkkum tiruppatiyampāṭuvārkkum tiruvāykkeḻvi Uṭai
yāṉukkum taḷiyilārkkum tevaraṭiyārkkum kān=taṟvarkkum tiruppaḷḷiccivikaiyārkkum tiruppaḷḷittoṅkaliṭuvārkkum tiruppaḷḷit tā
mam paṟiccutoṭuppataṟkum Ukaccarkkumāka nellu Eṇkalane tūṇippataṟkum prasādaṅ kuṭukkum paricaṭṭattukku nellu
patinaṟu kalamum tirunel patakkāka Eṇṇai Irupati nāḻikku (ai) Aiṅkalane Iru tūṇiyup piḷḷaiyārkku tiṉpaṇṭattukku Aiṅkuṟuṇi nānāḻiyu
m Arici nellu Aiympattāṟu kalane patakkiru nāḻiyum Āka nāḷ Oṉṟukku poṉ Eḻupattaiṅkalam In nellu Eḻupattaiṅ kalattukkum kā
vaṉūrāna kamalanārāyaṇac caruppetimaṅkalattu sabhaiyom koṇṭa kācu muppatukku kācu Oṉṟukku poṉ Arumoḻitevaṉāl Irukala tū
ṇip patakkāka van=ta poṉ Eḻupattaiṅ kalamum Āṭṭāṇṭu toṟum poliyūṭṭāka Ācan=tirakālamum tevarpaṇṭāratey koṭuvantu Aḷa
p pomāṉom kāvaṉūrāṉa kamalanārāyaṇaccaruppeti maṅkalattu sabhaiyom .
Digital edition of SII 38.137 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
